name: Unicommerce
description: Indias largest e-commerce supply chain SaaS — order, warehouse, multi-channel inventory management APIs.

seo.title: Unicommerce — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Unicommerce: Indias largest e-commerce supply chain SaaS — order, warehouse, multi-channel inventory management APIs.

when_to_use: Multi-channel order and inventory management for Indian e-commerce
Warehouse management system API for Indian fulfillment centers
Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho integration for Indian sellers
Returns and logistics orchestration for Indian D2C brands
Supply chain visibility APIs for Indian e-commerce platforms

pros: Mature OMS tailored for Indian marketplaces
APIs for orders, warehouses, and inventory sync
Integrates with Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra natively
Scales to high SKU counts and warehouses
cons: Integration work often needs their team
Pricing and contracts oriented at larger sellers
review.verdict: India's default ecommerce OMS backend — powerful at scale, heavy for small sellers.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large Indian ecommerce brands selling across multiple marketplaces
review.not_for: Small DTC shops or non-India sellers who don't need multi-marketplace OMS
